series_metadata.series_description: Contain information pertaining to limited branch school, including applications, curriculm information, documents of approval, correspondence, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 75 years after the school ceases to be in existence. ; Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; then destroy.; If not scanned, retain for 75 years after the school ceases to be in existence, then destroy, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
